completed_steps.summary: Classified the repository as a multi-part backend-first split-worker platform and generated the canonical core documentation set.
Refreshed the docs bundle to be self-contained, added the backend reference, coverage matrix, frontend component inventory, deployment guide, and normalized the machine-readable project metadata.

project_classification.primary_language: Python first; TypeScript for secondary UI

technology_stack.tech_summary: FastAPI, LangGraph, DSPy, Temporal, PostgreSQL, SQLAlchemy, Pydantic, Structlog, Langfuse
FastAPI, session filesystem routing, git helpers, shell execution, linting, asset serving
FastAPI, Genesis, MuJoCo, build123d, manufacturing workbenches, preview and simulation tooling
React 19, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, OpenAPI-generated client, Three.js, secondary UI surface
Strict Pydantic models, enums, simulation schemas, observability events, and filesystem policy helpers

resume_instructions: Documentation is complete. Start with docs/index.md, then use docs/backend-reference.md for backend/runtime questions, docs/component-inventory.md only for UI work, and docs/deployment-guide.md for operational questions.
